searchEmployeesAria: Search employees in list and schedule
aiAssistantWelcome: Hello! I am your CTOX Planning Assistant. I can help you automatically optimize the schedule, check for conflicts, or find short-term shift replacements due to illness. What can I do for you today?
noConflictsDetected: No active conflicts detected. The schedule meets all requirements.
noApprovedTimesheets: No approved timesheets available in the selected period.
clickToAssign: Click on a day to assign the employee to the project (8:00 AM - 4:00 PM):
confirmDeleteEmployee: Are you sure you want to delete the employee "{0}"? All assigned shifts will also be deleted.
confirmDeleteProject: Are you sure you want to delete the project "{0}"?
confirmDeleteProjectWithShifts: There are still {0} shifts planned for the project "{1}". Do you want to delete the project anyway?
confirmDeleteShift: Are you sure you want to delete this shift?
aiGenerateAlert: Planning Assistant: Generating optimized schedule for week {0} based on target hours & project requirements...
aiReplacementAlert: Planning Assistant: Searching for qualified replacement for reported absences...
aiSetupRequirement: At least one active employee and one active project must exist!
aiGenerateSuccess: I have successfully generated an optimized schedule draft (Mon-Fri) for all active employees! The shifts have been created in Draft mode, so you can adjust them before publishing.
conflictMaxHours: {0} exceeds the weekly maximum working hours ({1} hrs planned, target: {2} hrs)
aiCheckSuccess: I have run the conflict analysis: No rule violations (rest periods, maximum working hours, double bookings) found! Perfect scheduling.
aiCheckWarning: Attention! I have found {0} schedule conflicts or working hour excesses. Please check the conflicts panel on the bottom right.
noBillableHours: There are no approved hours in the selected period that can be billed.
allTimesheetsApproved: All submitted timesheets have been approved! 🎉

name: Name
notesPlaceholder: e.g. take over shift management, barista service...
